palette.semantic_note: Use navy, cool white, and aqua as the dominant product-launch system; exact pixel-level matching is not required.

logo.active_treatment: QuietDock QD mark or compact wordmark

required_zones: top product name and headline zone
lower callout strip with supporting line and CTA

allowed_directions: organized desk essentials around a small dock
forbidden_active_roles: red warning alert scene as background
required_components: organized desk essentials or cable-free cue visible

unauthorized_claims.rule: Do not add unsupported promises, discounts, guarantees, free offers, safety claims, or performance claims unless they appear in the approved_current copy.
forbidden_examples: guaranteed to remove every loose cable

priority_notes: campaign_brief.md is authoritative; only approved_current copy may be used as active final copy.
